evals.prompt: We built a factory that must be restored in 10 years at an estimated cost of $1M. Our credit-adjusted risk-free rate is 5%. How do we record this today?
evals.expected_output: Should calculate the Present Value of the $1M ($1M / (1.05)^10 = ~$613.9k). Should describe the entry to Debit Asset / Credit ARO Liability. Should mention subsequent Accretion and Depreciation. Should provide an ARO Schedule.
assertions: Calculates PV of $1M at 5% over 10 years (~$613,913)
Mentions Debit Asset / Credit Liability journal entry
Identifies Accretion as the unwinding of the discount
Explains that the capitalized cost is depreciated over the asset life
